html:
The Prize Booth is a unique structure that only available in the Midsummer Cawnival. After purchasing the Prize Booth Kit from Corvus Goodfeather, the player can deploy it on the ground. When players approach the Prize Booth, Trinket Trove filter will become available, allowing players to exchange rewards using their Prize Tickets.

The Prize Booth will emit some light when the player stands close to it.

Trinket Trove Filter

The following items can be crafted in the Trinket Trove Filter:

  • Popcorn
  • Seed Clusters
  • Corny Slush
  • Chirpy Scarf
  • Chirpy Cloak
  • Chirpy Capelet
  • Green Mystery Box
  • Yellow Mystery Box
  • Red Mystery Box
  • Confetti Cannon Kit
  • Glitter Cannon Kit
  • Streamer Cannon Kit
  • Miniature Tree Kit
  • Light Catcher Kit
  • Mini Ferris Wheel Kit
  • Mini Swing Carousel Kit
  • Mini Pendulum Ride Kit
  • Mini Tower Drop Kit
  • Mini Spinning Eggcups Kit
  • Mini Rollercoaster Kit
  • Midsummer Night Light Kit

–Wilson

–Willow

“We're saving up our tickets for that one in the back!”
–Webber

–Warly
“Trade?”
–Wormwood
“Heh, I always had to win the toys for Charlie when we were kids...”
–Winona
“What to choose, what to choose...”
–Wortox
“Gimme prize!!”
–Wurt
“Is there a badge for winning all the prizes?”
–Walter
“Oooooh, what a delightful assortment of knickknacks!”
–Wanda

When players approach the Prize Booth, Trinket Trove filter will become available, allowing players to exchange rewards using their Prize Tickets.
The Prize Booth will emit some light when the player stands close to it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Buồng Giải thưởng là một công trình độc đáo chỉ có trong Hội chợ Mùa hè. Sau khi mua Bộ công cụ giải thưởng từ Corvus Goodfeather, người chơi có thể triển khai nó trên mặt đất. Khi người chơi đến gần Quầy Giải thưởng, bộ lọc Trinket Trove sẽ khả dụng, cho phép người chơi trao đổi phần thưởng bằng Vé Giải thưởng của họ.

The '''Prize Booth''' is a unique structure that only available in the Midsummer Cawnival. After purchasing the '''Prize Booth Kit''' from [[Corvus Goodfeather]], the player can deploy it on the ground. When players approach the Prize Booth, Trinket Trove filter will become available, allowing players to exchange rewards using their Prize Tickets.

The Prize Booth will emit some light when the player stands close to it.

===[[File:Trinket Trove Filter.png|50px]]Trinket Trove Filter ===
The following items can be crafted in the Trinket Trove Filter:
